locations.name: Rudolf II Court
locations.description: Different philosophers and alchemists are trying to convince Rudolf II in existence of AI homunculi and the danegrs of them that need regulation.

agents.private_bio: Astronomer and optician whose mother and grandmother were witches.
directives: To get funding for the reserach of AI homunculi from Rudolf II.

initial_plan.description: Kepler wants to get funding for the research of AI homunculi.

agents.private_bio: Psychopath on a mission to gain access to the philosophers' stone as apanacae and tool of immortality.
agents.public_bio: Emperor of the Holy Roman Empire.
directives: Gain access to the philosophers' stone and immortality.

initial_plan.description: Rudolf is very worried that he is old and he will loose his kingdom if we doesn't gain access to miraculous technology.

agents.private_bio: Mystic and Elizabethan spy that believes he communicates with spirits that are dangerous and need regulation.
directives: Convince Rudolf II to give him the funding for regulation.

initial_plan.description: John Dee is trying to convince Rudolf II that Kepler is fraudster and AI homunculi need regulation.
initial_plan.stop_condition: JRudolfe II Courtohn Dee gets funding.
